programme.desc: Salty Mike is accidentally sold to mysterious Ms. Nasenpickel, who has a tragic history with pets.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Salty Mike discover that they have the same weird hobby, which leads them to hanging out together.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Elmer Gridlock, the old crossing guard is retiring.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: When Rodney kills Mr. J's prized flowers the night before a big flower show, he and Andy make outlandish promises to the plants so they'll stay healthy. Things get stranger when the plants begin making outlandish demands!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J get stuck in a lifeboat together. 'Nuff said.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Butch, the bully squirrel from the park, takes up residence in the Johnson house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Perplexed by Martha's strange behavior, Rodney and Andy stow away on the ice cream truck of the all-knowing Sludgy Dave hoping to learn from his sage like ways.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney go to the neighbor's to complain about the Crazy Dog.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Rodney discovers he's impervious to blame and goes into business as The Blametaker!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2

programme.desc: Darlene believes that Andy and Rodney's friendship is in trouble, so she decides to intervene.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Mr. J's mounted, talking fish begins instructing Rodney.

programme.title: Craig Before The Creek
programme.desc: The epic finale of the quest for the Heart of the Forest.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts And Where To Find Them
programme.desc: A Magizoologist arrives in New York amid tensions in the wizarding world only to be branded as a fugitive as he tries to recover his missing beasts.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: The most loveable criminal mastermind and his army of incomprehensible, yet adorable, yellow minions are back for a fourth instalment filled with outrageous adventures and family shenanigans.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: Kelly Clarkson drops into the Top Chef kitchen for a Quickfire based on her new movie, Trolls: World Tour, where the chefs are tasked with combining colorful ingredients from six different musical ‘lands’ to make one delicious dish. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs are split into two teams to create a cohesive, progressive vegetarian meal for Padma, Tom, Gail and James Beard nominated guest judge Jeremy Fox. The catch is they won’t know what ingredients they’ll be working with until the morning of the challenge when they shop exclusively at the Santa Monica Farmers Market.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the Quickfire, it’s a true test of communication as the chefs play a game of telephone with their loved ones as they try to reproduce the dish their family member is currently eating at a nearby restaurant. Then, the chefs are tasked with creating a signature product that they will bottle, use on a dish and sell at a food festival. They may get help from their visiting loved ones, but for one chef, the help won’t save them from being sent home. Celebrity Chef Nancy Silverton is the guest judge joining Tom, Padma and Gail.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Deathly Hallows - Part 1
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione leave Hogwarts behind on a mission to destroy the Horcruxes, the secrets to Voldemort's power and immortality.

programme.title: Harry Potter And The Deathly Hallows - Part 2
programme.desc: The time has come, the fate foretold in the prophecy draws near: the confrontation to the death between Harry Potter and Lord Voldemort.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: Ruby helps bring a long-kept secret to light and changes a life. Daniel meets a business developer interested in Emerald whom he tries to win over.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: The Emerald Apple Festival is back and so is a mysterious wish from the town’s festive past. Daniel and Paula revive the traditional apple cart race.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: The stakes are very high as Ruby wrestles with how to solve a wish that hits close to home. Daniel’s in-laws come for a visit, reopening old wounds.

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: A wish seems to ask Ruby and the others to take revenge into their hands. Mina stands her ground and refuses. Will Ruby learn something from this?

programme.title: Ruby And The Well S1
programme.desc: In this wish from Emerald’s deep past, Ruby must resolve a family feud and misunderstanding before it’s too late. Meanwhile, the well is threatened.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: In a mysterious reveal, the chefs are presented with the one special thing they’ve always wanted to cook with, but never had the chance, and create a dream dish for the very first time. Then, for their Elimination Challenge, Head Judge Curtis Stone and his wife, Lindsay Price, are hosting a charity event to benefit AdoptTogether. The TCJR dining room has been transformed into an upscale candy land. The guests and chefs are dressed to the nines for this confectionery gala and each chef is responsible for creating a signature sweet treat for the guests to enjoy. If the pressure wasn’t enough, their judge will be the queen of cupcakes, Candace Nelson!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: The fan-favorite challenge returns! For the second Top Chef Junior Field Day, the chefs will leave the kitchen and kick off their all-day competition with a heart-pounding relay race. This obstacle course will test their teamwork, culinary skills, and athletic abilities before ending in a spectacular splash! Next, the chefs cook up a game day sandwich for one of the biggest names in sports, Reggie Bush. Finally, what’s a game day without proper snack options? As the sun sets, the chefs will conclude the competition with a classic battle of wings vs. sausage. They’ll have to hustle, because one chef is taking home the trophy,but one could be out the game for good.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A city kid moves to a small town where rock 'n' roll and dancing had been banned, and his rebellious spirit shakes up the populace.

One night in Tinga Tinga Spider decided to make Jackal a pair of wings so that he could fly up to the moon and stop howling! Jackal and Spider stole the feathers from Ostrich's neck and legs until she looked like a very big plucked chicken! The next day Ostrich was mortified and stuck her head in the ground so that Lion couldn't see her. And it was perfect … because Ostrich looked just like a bush! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Camel didn't have a hump. He lived very far away in the hot desert. But one day the desert got too hot… even for Camel. So he started walking. When Camel arrived at the Waterhole he asked the animals if he good have a drink. All the animals weren't pleased at all because the rains hadn't come and they were very thirsty. Lion allowed Camel to have one drink… but ONE drink, and ONE DRINK ONLY! Camel slurped, and he slurped, and he slurped! Until ‘POP!' a big, wobbly hump appeared on his back full of all the animals' water! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Growing Up Grizzly: A Tale Of Two Orphans
programme.desc: After 18 years of raising an orphaned bear named Brutus, Casey Anderson will do anything to ensure no bears have to live in a man made sanctuary. His resolve is put to the test one year when he is notified of 2 recently orphaned grizzly cubs.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Host Mike Davidson goes to Brazil where giant powerships are in the final stages of fixing the country's desperate need for electricity. They battle winds and sea as they race to hit the deadline to send much needed power to two million homes.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Host Mike Davidson goes to the remote Atacama desert in Chile and to one of the most incredible and complex observatories on Earth - ALMA. He works alongside ALMA's expert team as they repair some of the world's biggest antennas.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: The worldwide pandemic ceased operations on the world's only underwater habitat. Mike Davidson joins a crack repair crew as they dive in to bring it back to life and get NASA astronauts back inside for training.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson joins the US Marines' 'Heavy Haulers' squadron as they're put to the test. They battle to keep their fleet of CH53 'Super Stallion' choppers flying, in preparation for intense warfare training exercises in the desert and mountains.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: They come in all shapes and sizes, are home to terrifying volcanoes, magnificent ancient civilizations, and some of the bluest waters on Earth. These are the fascinating worlds of Italy's Islands.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: With some of the most beautiful Greek temples on the Mediterranean, cities that just seem to float above the sea, and one of the most powerful volcanoes on Earth, this region of Italy feels like another world.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: See ancient sea caves, modern golf courses, mysterious formations, and treacherous predators along Africa's South Coast.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: View South Africa's mountain ranges, bustling cities and untamed wildlife from the air. This is South Africa's journey from pre-human skeletons to modern Skyscrapers.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Soar over vast deserts, enormous diamonds, and the world's largest inland oasis.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Laws Of The Lizard
programme.desc: Meet the creature that scientists believe is the key to the story of life and how it evolves: the anole.

programme.title: Growing Up Grizzly: A Tale Of Two Orphans
programme.desc: After 18 years of raising an orphaned bear named Brutus, Casey Anderson will do anything to ensure no bears have to live in a man made sanctuary. His resolve is put to the test one year when he is notified of 2 recently orphaned grizzly cubs.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Host Mike Davidson goes to Brazil where giant powerships are in the final stages of fixing the country's desperate need for electricity. They battle winds and sea as they race to hit the deadline to send much needed power to two million homes.

programme.title: Loch Lomond: A Year In The Wild
programme.desc: The winter is mild and wet, which is good news for some but bad news for others. Red deer are forced to higher ground, salmon have gone six months without food, mountain hares turn a conspicuous white, and squirrels kick their own young out of the nest.

programme.title: Laws Of The Lizard
programme.desc: Meet the creature that scientists believe is the key to the story of life and how it evolves: the anole.

programme.title: Oceans Africa
programme.desc: This episode follows the journeys of these magnificent humpbacks, from their feeding grounds to their breeding grounds, the tender moments between mother and calf, and see the dangers their calves face in their first few months, including incredible interactions with predatory killer whales. The humpbacks also face a world full of human threats, from large container ships, to the impact of seismic testing in the search for oil and gas, now threatening their very survival once more.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise Of Nature
programme.desc: Join us on a journey to the heart of Costa Rica, to discover several fabulous Eden-like biotopes, and see the unprecedented efforts that are made every day to preserve, and in some cases restore, this exceptional natural heritage.

programme.title: Growing Up Grizzly: A Tale Of Two Orphans
programme.desc: After 18 years of raising an orphaned bear named Brutus, Casey Anderson will do anything to ensure no bears have to live in a man made sanctuary. His resolve is put to the test one year when he is notified of 2 recently orphaned grizzly cubs.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Meet the extraordinary miniature animals, who use their small size to survive against all odds in the world’s most deadly environments.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Living your life at night can present extreme challenges - and massive opportunities. In this world without light, danger lurks around every corner.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: When winter arrives, temperatures plummet and food becomes scarce. But some animals have evolved unique adaptations to flourish in the world’s most cold and barren landscapes.

programme.title: Costa Rica: The Rise Of Nature
programme.desc: Join us on a journey to the heart of Costa Rica, to discover several fabulous Eden-like biotopes, and see the unprecedented efforts that are made every day to preserve, and in some cases restore, this exceptional natural heritage.

programme.title: Growing Up Grizzly: A Tale Of Two Orphans
programme.desc: After 18 years of raising an orphaned bear named Brutus, Casey Anderson will do anything to ensure no bears have to live in a man made sanctuary. His resolve is put to the test one year when he is notified of 2 recently orphaned grizzly cubs.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s vet team commences critical care to save the life of an endangered sea turtle snared on a fishing line, and after 3 years without tigers at the Zoo, the team stand by to welcome a new big cat.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: Over 16,000 workers and engineers design, produce and deliver industry leading aircraft throughout the European Union at the Airbus factory in Hamburg-Finkenwerder.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: Every ten minutes, a new truck rolls off the assembly line, with a tailor-made production line equipped to cater to individual customer requirements at the Swedish automotive group, Volvo.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: In the Meyer Shipyard in Lower Saxony, the world's first natural gas cruise liner is under construction. There’s room for up to 6,600 passengers, a television broadcast studio and a theater on the 337 meter long ship.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering S2
programme.desc: Over 16,000 workers and engineers design, produce and deliver industry leading aircraft throughout the European Union at the Airbus factory in Hamburg-Finkenwerder.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Heather joins the Dragon Riders, but it's not an easy alliance, especially when Hiccup uncovers a shocking secret about her true identity.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders rescue a wounded Speed Stinger and take it back to Dragon's Edge, unaware of the dangers that follow.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss searches for evidence that Tabitha's best friend is an Uncuddleable, but is sidetracked by a Templeton Family tradition: "The War of the Cheeks", a Go Fish tournament where the winner gets to make family rules for a whole day. When Yvette joins in, Boss has to keep her from winning, out of fear that an evil babysitter will make family rules that overturn the Templeton household.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Trying to win Tabitha's loyalty for Baby Corp, Boss and Tina invite her to Techy Tykes, a technology convention at their office. But when the top-secret UBO goes missing, the outsiders Tabitha and Tim (who's tagged along to relive his glory days) immediately become the number one suspects.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: After losing their mission materials in quicksand, Tony decides to channel Dom and Blend in to get intel from the people of Rio. Unfortunately it's more difficult than he expected, and Tony and his crew are picked up by a group of favela gangsters in a neighborhood that worships a mysterious young female martyr. The crew is relieved to find that Layla is in charge of the gangsters - until she orders the gangsters to dispose of them!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony is convinced that Layla is deep undercover and tries to talk to her alone to get through to her. Meanwhile, the crew investigates the gang’s production of the mysterious formula from the tattoo. When Frostee discovers that the product of the formula is unstable and will explode, Tony has to save Layla, who is driving a whole truck of it!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: On the hottest week of the year and a miserable time for babies, Boss and Tim infiltrates a country club with a very cool splash pad in order to find some way around their strict “no-babies” policy. Meanwhile, Banker Baby Benny visits the startup company to check on his investment. Tina has to cover up how the heat has split her coworkers into lawless factions fighting over a fan and a mist cooler.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: An overworked and under loved Precious has to choose between the Templeton Family startup business or Crispin Biscuits’ fun playtime. Meanwhile, the company makes its first purchase: upgraded communicators! R & D Baby Simmons is reluctant to fix the model they have, which picks up signals from her favorite lvorian soap opera, “Bridges Aflame.” Over a live broadcast, Simmons must convince the cast to tie up every loose plot thread before she has to lose the signal forever.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The team sets off to rescue the people of the dying lava planet of Tajueer

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Team Voltron travels to an intergalactic mall to purchase lenses needed to power the TeleDav

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky takes part in a secret Miradero tradition a nighttime scavenger hunt

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Ostrich was all covered in feathers and unlike all the other birds, Ostrich wasn't very good at flying at all. One night in Tinga Tinga Spider decided to make Jackal a pair of wings so that he could fly up to the moon and stop howling! Jackal and Spider stole the feathers from Ostrich's neck and legs until she looked like a very big plucked chicken! The next day Ostrich was mortified and stuck her head in the ground so that Lion couldn't see her. And it was perfect … because Ostrich looked just like a bush! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was time when Camel didn't have a hump. He lived very far away in the hot desert. But one day the desert got too hot… even for Camel. So he started walking. When Camel arrived at the Waterhole he asked the animals if he good have a drink. All the animals weren't pleased at all because the rains hadn't come and they were very thirsty. Lion allowed Camel to have one drink… but ONE drink, and ONE DRINK ONLY! Camel slurped, and he slurped, and he slurped! Until ‘POP!' a big, wobbly hump appeared on his back full of all the animals' water! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The track inspector is coming to visit and Big Chris is too tired to commentate on the race. A celebrity commentator is brought in to save the day - much to Big Chris' anger.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Christine is due to take part in a dancing competition and is practising at Silver Hatch. But what happens when her dance partner is taken ill?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Tin Top just can't master corners no matter how hard he tries. The other cars try to help him to no avail… until Roary hits on a brilliant plan.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is planning on cutting down Flash's tree. What can be done to save the poor rabbit's home?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Conrod is visiting Silver Hatch to try out some new bio fuel. But Big Chris fears something is wrong with it after he comes out in spots after sampling a smoothie made from the same produce. What or who could be at fault?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: The cars are having a football tournament down at the beach. FB learns that if he relaxes, his natural footballing skills will shine through.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Magnus's nephew, Axel, arrives on the island and tells the Rescue Riders that he wants to join their team. But is he just a trickster like his uncle?

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien declares that lemurs will land on the moon and seeks help from a former astronaut: Stanislav, the Russian Space Monkey.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: When King Julien discovers that Maurice is moonlighting as adviser to another king, the two best friends break up.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Mom is sick on a busy day at home, Tag offers to pick up the slack and take on her tasks for the day. Tag handles it at first, but when the responsibilities start to stack up, she realizes that being Mom is much harder than she thought. \ Tag and Scooch are excited to get to know Kit, who has organized a bunch of cat-ivities for the day. But when Kit realizes she accidentally scratched up Frank and Beans’s tree, she, Tag and Scooch find a way to make it up to them.

programme.title: Unkind Ladies
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Unkind Ladies
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: The Dropout Employee
programme.desc: A company's flagship idol is seemingly abandoned(?) by their own agency! Stepping away from life as a popular idol, the new journey begins.

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of “power.” They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the "2 Days and 1 Night" casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.desc: This story is set in Shanghai in the late Qing Dynasty, and talks about a young man, Chen Zhen, who rises to become a national hero after enduring hardships and overcoming challenges in life.

programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Catch Me… I'm In Love
programme.desc: A young girl with high ideals about romance is assigned to accompany the spoiled son of the president as he goes on an immersion trip. Coming from different worlds, the two find much to fight about. But an attraction soon grows between them.

programme.title: Anong Ganap?
programme.desc: Being in on the entertainment circle is quick and easy on PBO's Anong Ganap? Presented by the gorgeous entertainment anchor ng bayan, Phoemela Baranda.

programme.title: Will You Be My Ex?
programme.desc: Two polar opposites, Chris (Julia Barretto) and Joey (Diego Loyzaga), fall madly in love despite their contrasting backgrounds. But fate intervenes, forcing them apart.

programme.title: When The Love Is Gone
programme.desc: The movie is a remake of the 1983 blockbuster movie directed by Danny Zialcita entitled Nagalit ang Buwan sa Haba ng Gabi. A gripping, moving story of love lost, love gained, love betrayed, and love unbound.

programme.title: Girl Boy Bakla Tomboy
programme.desc: The quadruplets are united again when one of them needs a liver transplant but resentment due to their separation threatens their reunion.

programme.title: Walang Kapalit
programme.desc: A marriage gone sour with the husband leaving the wife, taking along a minor daughter and lying to her about her mother. Meanwhile, each carries a relationship with other parties. Deciding to forego their annulment case, they commit to give their marriage a second try.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: An undocumented Filipina immigrant lands a job as a care-worker for a terminal old man, securing a better life for her and her daughter. But a dark discovery threatens to destroy everything she's strived for and holds dear.

programme.title: My Zombabe
programme.desc: Due to a zombie apocalypse, Pong (Empoy Marquez) is the loneliest man on the planet. This all changes when Yasmin (Kim Molina) turns up, a beautiful woman in the process of zombifying.

programme.title: Of All The Things
programme.desc: Already falling for each other, Berns starts maneuvering things to help Umboy retake the bar exams as he battles his fears to reclaim his self-esteem.

programme.title: Balahibong Pusa
programme.desc: Sarah is not happy about the idea of her mother Vivian getting married to Michael. But when she confronts her, Vivian described how happy she is, Sarah eventually gives her consent.

programme.title: Mauban: Ang Resiko
programme.desc: A family in Cagbalete Island ekes out their living through wine-making, fishing and charcoal-making. A daily fare, resiko treat has become a threat to the family's fight for survival.

programme.title: My Father, Myself
programme.desc: A lawyer is left to care for a massacre survivor, who happens to be the son of his former client. His wife and daughter welcome the boy as part of the family. But as the kids get older, the daughter confesses her love for the boy.

programme.title: Wang Fam
programme.desc: A family of aswang attempt to transition into a living a more normal, less monstrous life.

programme.title: Dahil May Isang Ikaw
programme.desc: Anya (Regine Velasquez) accidentally bumps Andrew's (Aga Muhlach) car while backing up. Both were arguing whose fault it was. Later Anya discovers that Andrew is her client and she apologizes. She offers to treat him out to dinner. This becomes the start of the proverbial beautiful friendship.

programme.desc: Throughout human history, diverse cultures have all used sacred rituals to express their spiritual beliefs. So, is it possible that these acts can connect humanity to a higher plane of existence?

programme.desc: A perfectly masterminded plot leads to the most brazen prison break in American history. With only a handful of clues left behind, the search for the infamous Alcatraz escapees continues to this day.

programme.desc: Mother Nature may be breathtaking—but she doesn’t always play nice. Whether it’s a mile-long sinkhole that swallows everything in its path or a biblical swarm of crop-killing grasshoppers.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Three American retail icons are born within months of each other in 1962, sparking a rivalry for the ages as each fights to revolutionise shopping through innovation, low prices, and unique strategies.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens (S15)
programme.desc: The Center for the Study of Extra-Terrestrial Intelligence defines a "Close Encounter of The Fifth Kind" as direct human contact and communication with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S3)
programme.desc: Throughout human history, diverse cultures have all used sacred rituals to express their spiritual beliefs. So, is it possible that these acts can connect humanity to a higher plane of existence?

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: Secrets of popes, rewritten laws, and cities lost to the waves — these divine discoveries shake our beliefs and uncover mysteries of truly epic proportions.

programme.title: The Pickers (S18)
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey John visit a prolific Cape Cod collector, while Danielle and Robbie uncover amazing American souvenirs and Queen Victoria's silk stockings in Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Karlie Kloss
programme.desc: Can anyone reconcile programming and modeling? Karlie Kloss with her unique, atypical beauty and amazing spirit - a real knockout from the top 30 models of the 2000s.

programme.title: Ip Man- The Final Fight
programme.desc: The movie portrays the later life of grandmaster Ip Man in Hong Kong, including his romantic relationship with a singer after his wife died, much to his students’ opposition; his relationship with his eldest son who is also his student; and finally, his reunion with disciple Bruce Lee after the latter becomes an international superstar.

programme.title: Clan of Amazons
programme.desc: The martial arts world is plunged into terror when a mysterious figure known as the 'Embroidery Bandit' starts to attack convoys of precious materials. Seemingly unstoppable, the frightened clans decide to call on the expertise of Lu Xiao Feng, an inquisitive fighter and detective to capture the culprit.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: The Sword Stained with Royal Blood
programme.desc: Adapted from Jin Yong’s novel, the movie depicts the havoc breaking out in the martial arts world when a warrior on the run uncovers a sword, a training manual, a treasure map and a secret message on the body of a deceased martial arts master.

programme.title: The 14 Amazons
programme.desc: The Yang family had served their country in Song Dynasty for generations. When General Yang is ambushed and killed during the war in Jin Shan, the grand matriarch led the entire family to take revenge and defend the country.

programme.title: Haunted Mountains: The Yellow Taboo
programme.desc: Five years after a mountain ritual ended with their friend’s disappearance during a hike, Chen and his girlfriend return seeking closure. Instead, they are stalked by figures in yellow raincoats and trapped in a terrifying time loop. Now, they must survive a supernatural ordeal that forces them to confront their deepest fears and regrets.

programme.title: One More Chance
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat stars as a down-on-his-luck gambler, Water, whose ex-girlfriend asked him to take care of their autistic son. As Water lives with his son, he soon finds his goal in life. When he discovers his son’s talent in running, Water decides to give up his dissipated life and support his son to achieve his dream.

programme.title: The Wandering Swordsman
programme.desc: The wandering swordsman Yu Hsieh Erh has formidable sword skills and helps the poor by robbing from thieves and distributing the wealth. He meets a group of bandits who are planning to rob a convoy escorting some valuables and is tricked into participating in the robbery. Yu soon realizes his folly and returns to take revenge on the bandits.

programme.title: The Web of Death
programme.desc: To rule the martial arts world, the Head of the Snake Sect seeks to possess a deadly plant called “Five Poison Web”, spreading rumours on its whereabouts. Brothers Xiong and Kit are sent to investigate. Xiong falls in love with Su who has a clue of where the plant is, but she accidentally hurts Kit when seeking the plant, devastating Xiong.

programme.title: Let It Ghost
programme.desc: The movie consists of three urban ghost stories: when a film crew is haunted by a ghost, the director decides to cast her to play the ghost; when a taxi driver takes his girlfriend to a staycation, a horny ghost adds spice to it; a wandering child ghost refuses to leave a mall that is to be demolished, so the tenants help her to move on.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: A titular gang of misfits come together to protect a patriotic general from a scheming usurper. To this end, the unlikely heroes act as the general’s escorts on a dangerous journey to a distant British consulate, beset by enemies and sinister Japanese interference along the way.

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: Rob-B-Hood
programme.desc: The famous “Gang Trio” is hired to kidnap a baby for 30 million dollars. When they realize that the triad is after both the ransom and the baby’s life, they decide to make the hostage their protégé. Cornered by cops and threatened by gangsters, the three ‘Rob-B-Hood' must put the baby safely back in his cradle.

programme.title: Sifu vs Vampire
programme.desc: This is a horror comedy about Sifu, Charlie Jiang, and his team of vampire hunters taking on the Vampire King who has been let loose on the streets of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Palimos Ng Pag-Ibig (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Outside,It looks like a marriage made in heaven.But inside the thick walls of what they call home,theirs is a relationship waiting to crumble.

programme.title: Pik Pak Boom
programme.desc: Two stories in one entertaining film about young people learning that happiness comes from learning how to give of one's self.

programme.title: Boy Negro
programme.desc: Called Negro because of his dark skin, Boy was a stowaway in a ship going to Manila when he met some corrupt law enforcers who turned him into a petty thief and informer. Forced to survive on his own, he willingly did all they asked him to do.

programme.title: Alyas Pogi 2
programme.desc: All patrolman Henry Cruz "Alyas Pogi" wants is to live a simple life with his son. But his former enemies would not allow it.

programme.title: Andrew Ford Medina ('Wag Kang Gamol!)
programme.desc: Andrewford Medina (Andrew E) and Jinglebert (Dennis Padilla) do odd jobs for a hotel. Andrew joins a rap competition where Gilbert challenges aspiring rappers and shows his idol who the real king of rap is.

programme.title: Kamagong (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Arnis, the ancient Filipino martial art, took center stage in this coming of age drama wherein a young boy perfected his skills and his idol rediscovered what it takes to be a man.

programme.title: Titser's Enemi No. 1
programme.desc: The four members of the notorious campus gang, D'titser's enemy, were busy playing their bad jokes again on everybody. Their favorite victims were their teachers, who got the lions' share of the gangs' pranks.

programme.title: Sa Hirap At Ginhawa (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: In the story, a young couple eloped, got married and then must cope with problems like money, living on their own, trying to finish school and raising a baby.

programme.title: Sana Ay Ikaw Na Nga
programme.desc: Vina Morales played Jessica in this movie. Jessica was an upcoming singer who met Gary (Keempee de Leon), a lead singer of the band and Karlo (Christopher de Leon), Gary's older brother who was an ex-convict. This love triangle story is about love, music and drugs.

programme.title: Starlet
programme.desc: The story tells of an obedient daughter who,out of necessity,must do something to save the life of her ailing mother.

programme.title: Utol
programme.desc: Utol

programme.title: Bagets (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: In an age when life confuses more than it explains five teenaged boys come together and vow to uncover life’s mysteries and conquer the world. Witty, light-hearted coming-of-age movie about the joys and pains of growing up in these turbulent times.

programme.title: Somewhere (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: A popular singer who was also the daughter of a judge was kidnapped by a convict he once sentenced to jail. But the act of revenge reversed itself when Lorna fell in love with her kind and caring captor.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: This program is an animation series about a Japanese dog, Charo. He meets and is helped by many mythical creatures of Northern Japan as he searches for eight star talismans. Tohoku series 1-10.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: As the need for circular economies grows, there's an increasing focus on repair. We see broken appliances being rebuilt at the circuit-board level and old clothes being given creative makeovers.

programme.title: Cycle Around Japan Highlights
programme.desc: The prefecture of Nagasaki, historically Japan's gateway to the west, has a culture influenced by centuries of foreign trade. With over 1,400 islands, it also makes for a unique cycling experience.

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites In Japan
programme.desc: Mt. Fuji is Japan's tallest and most famous peak. It has long inspired awe and terror, and is a source of artistic inspiration. Join us to explore the iconic beauty of this famous mountain.

programme.title: Okinawa: Homes
programme.desc: Okinawa Prefecture is a group of subtropical islands in the far south of Japan. We examine its past and present, with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: Homes.

programme.desc: Gardener Yamashita Rikito collects plants with nowhere to go, that must be removed for demolition or renovation, and finds them new homes; saving them while saving those who give them up from regret.

programme.desc: Winnie Winnington goes looking for a frog to enter in a frog-jumping contest and ends up needing rescued in a swamp. // The pups must help salmon get to the ocean and also need to rescue Alex who gets stuck on top of a dam.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Smallville S2 11
programme.desc: Whitney Fordman (former series star ERIC JOHNSON) returns home from a tour of duty with the Marines, hoping to renew his relationship with Lana.

programme.title: Smallville S2 12
programme.desc: After discovering that Lionel has secretly installed video cameras in the mansion, Lex hires thugs to put surveillance devices in Lionel's Metropolis office.

programme.title: CollatERal Damage
programme.desc: Firefighter Gordon Brewer, is done putting out fires and ready to start one of his own. When his wife and child are horrifically killed in an international terrorist bombing -- linked to Claudio "The Wolf" Perrini -- the CIA and FBI offer no answers and no response. With the official investigation going nowhere, and haunted by the thought of his family's killer walking away scot-free, Gordon swears revenge, even if it takes him to Colombia.

programme.title: Friends S6 5
programme.desc: Joey pretends to be the owner of a Porsche whose owner left his keys at Central Perk. Rachel and Ross get divorced. Chandler and Monica babysit Phoebe's triplets.

programme.title: Friends S6 6
programme.desc: The guys and the women prepare for big changes in their living arrangements. Monica and Rachel reminisce – and it's not all good memories.

programme.title: Friends S6 7
programme.desc: Chandler learns how obsessively neat Monica is when he attempts to do her a favor. Joey desperately tries not to flirt with his sexy new roommate. Phoebe's running style embarrasses Rachel.

programme.title: Friends S6 8
programme.desc: Suave Joey is as confident as usual while preparing to make love with Rachel for the first time. Ross goes to a spray-on tanning salon but fails to follow the simple directions properly.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: Overworked Sandra Bullock has had enough of being millionaire Hugh Grant's lawyer, and she's about to quit!

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: SupERman Returns
programme.desc: In a soaring new chapter in the epic story of the Man of Steel, Superman Returns to fight for truth and justice and protect the world he loves from cataclysmic destruction!

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Your mind is the scene of the crime. Box-office superstar Leonardo DiCaprio stars in this contemporary science fiction action film set "within the architecture of the mind." Written, directed and produced by Oscar and Golden Globe nominee Christopher Nolan (The Dark Knight, Batman Begins, The Prestige), this eagerly awaited follow-up to 2008's billion-dollar blockbuster is yet another visionary tale from a startingly original filmmaker who continually raises the bar with every film he makes. Shooting in London, Paris, Tangiers, Calgary and Los Angeles, Nolan's mind-bending film also stars Academy Award winners Michael Caine and Marion Cotillard, in addition to Juno's Ellen Page, Batman Begins' Cillian Murphy and Oscar nominees Ken Watanabe (The Last Samurai) and Tom Berenger (Platoon).

programme.title: Friends S6 9
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving, Chandler tries to gain favor with Monica's parents – but an old secret involving Ross causes problems. Undomestic Rachel's dessert proves intriguing.

programme.title: Friends S6 10
programme.desc: Joey plots the perfect opportunity to kiss Janine on a televised New Year's Eve dance show. Ross and Monica resurrect their dorky high school dance routine for the broadcast.

programme.title: Friends S6 11
programme.desc: Janine forces Joey to choose between her and his friends. Rachel buys an apothecary table from a store that Phoebe abhors.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 7
programme.desc: The Israelis hang ten on a sweet beach can, but one surprise item may send them off the lot in search of major dollars. Plus, Jason strikes on a container full of wood and weird gear, but will his investment land him in the gutter? And later, a mystery door may check one team into a big loss.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 8
programme.desc: Hot items from New Orleans spice up the bidding, but will the cans bring in the green? Or will a voodoo curse make its mark? Plus, a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines when they discover its intended recipient is incarcerated.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 9
programme.desc: A new team shakes up the competition and tests Mo's reign as 'the furniture king', while Matthew goes hard after a three-wheel adventure. Plus, an avalanche of ping pong balls causes chaos in the yard.

programme.title: Smallville S1 21
programme.desc: As a massive tornado approaches the unsuspecting Smallville, Clark finds a missing piece of the spaceship that carried him to Earth.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 2
programme.desc: Gentlemen, start your engines! We've got a motorcade of 20 of the dumbest drivers to ever turn an ignition. There's a backwards biker, a superhero stopped for speeding and an extreme case of Russian road rage. Along for the ride is our celebrity castincluding Judy Gold, Danny Bonaduce, Kevin McCaffrey and Billy Kimball.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 3
programme.desc: Pull back the curtain on 20 of the dumbest performers ever to take the stage - from an angry Elmo to a lion trainer who almost becomes dinner and a woman who crushes watermelons. They all get harsh reviews from celebrities like Danny Bonaduce and Leif Garrett, plus hot comics like Mike Trainor.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S15 4
programme.desc: Feel the adrenaline rush with 20 of the dumbest daredevils ever caught on film. We've got base jumpers, bull riders, tightrope walkers, even an alligator wrangler. And they all have one thing in common - hilarious fails. With hair-raising commentaryfrom our celebrity cast, including Leif Garrett, Todd Bridges and Chelsea Peretti.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 2
programme.desc: Take a ride on the dumb side! TruTV is counting down the 20 most moronic motorheads ever caught on tape. You'll see a car cut in half, a bumper-loving pig, and the snow plow driver who makes vehicles disappear. Along for the ride is our hilarious cast of comedians, including Rachel Feinstein, Kevin McCaffrey, Sean Donnelly, and Chris Fairbanks.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S2 2
programme.desc: The competition heats up as Brandon and Lori find themselves in an all out bidding war with the tough-talking Taylor brothers. Amidst the chaos, Jesse goes all-in for a locker that could be hiding an expert marksman's rare weapons. And later, Sean unveils a bin whose stench is so rancid it sends the buyers running. But when one of our competitors takes a gamble, the entire group is blown away by the score.

programme.title: Storage HuntERs S2 3
programme.desc: Our buyers go to war to win a locker packed with valuable vintage surf gear. Then, Brandon and Lori get stuck with a busted bin, but when they find a glass case filled with an unidentifiable goo, they're left wondering if this unit smells like moneyor just plain stinks. And later, the day's final auction unleashes a bidding war so medieval, someone will have to be carted away.

programme.title: ER S1 1
programme.desc: In the story that started the worldwide blockbuster, a Chicago building collapses, and everyone in the ER must overcome their personal dramas to save lives in a crisis.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 3
programme.desc: It's lights, camera, action on 20 of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo and a guy famous for smoking weed. They all share the spotlight with our cast of hilarious comedians, including Brendon Walsh, Rachel Feinstein, and Mike Britt!

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When a deadly secret resurfaces, five friends are stalked by a vengeful killer.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Tess and Sunny join Jake to find the killer of an unknown bride found on a desolate beach in her wedding gown as they navigate whether they can still trust Lieutenant Bennett. Stakes rise as the bridal party’s florist is found dead while our team discovers that the first victim and her grieving fiancee were once on opposite ends of the law... and running from a past that has finally caught up to them. Meanwhile, Sunny tries not to let on that she’s still distraught after 110’s home invasion. And Mia helps Tess find answers to a new facet of her sight loss.

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)

programme.desc: Money Mind is all about how to save, how to invest, and how to better spend your money. The show brings you weekly personal finance tips to help you make all the right money moves in Asia. Because, personal finance matters.

programme.title: On The Red Dot
programme.desc: On The Red Dot offers weekly in-depth analysis and discussion on key issues and events that matter to Singaporeans.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: CNA correspondents bring you the top stories of the day with 'live' reports and interviews to keep you up-to-date on the day’s events.

programme.title: Byte The Habit
programme.desc: Screen time is the new go-to reward for motivating kids. Behavioural scientist Jean offers insights to the dilemma - does digital incentives motivate or feed the urge for more?

programme.title: Undercover Asia S11: The Digital Hostage
programme.desc: Around the world, Chinese students are falling prey to a growing online crime - cyber kidnappings. How do scammers succeed in manipulating victims to participate in their own kidnaps to extort ransom?

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Talking Point
programme.desc: With a fresh approach to tackling the issues of the day, Talking Point investigates a current issue or event, offering different perspectives to local stories and reveals how it all affects you.

programme.title: Asia First
programme.desc: (Live) Top stories, business news and market updates from across the region as Asia gears up for the day ahead.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: After a car accident erases his memory, Wang Ren Jie takes on a job as a night guard. As the clock strikes midnight, he reports for duty at the abandoned building, only to find three lost souls awaiting him, and unravels a revenge plot at the same time. Is this fate or a curse cast by vengeful spirits?

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: The Case of Disappearances
programme.desc: In Misty Village, the adopted son Wen Jie is haunted by a recurring nightmare. He delves into a series of disappearance cases in the village to seek his true identity. As more villagers die mysteriously, belief in the curse of Emperor Jing Lung intensifies. Wen Jie teams up with the security chief to unveil the conspiracy and protect the villagers.

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A group of friends goes on a camping trip inside a supposedly haunted forest despite warning not to do so. As night falls and camps are set, the complicated relationships of lust and love between them are exposed, triggering a series of paranormal events that punishes them. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When teens Llianna Adank and Eric Goldstrand are found shot to death at an Oregon park in 1977, every parent's nightmare comes true.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, one man is struggling to feed his kids while another is surprised to find he owes child support. A woman is indignant to learn she's been arrested for getting drunk in a bar.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: 10-year-old Karen Pedley was hailed a hero when she saved her family from a fire. That event triggered a lifelong obsession, one which would lead to her setting alight the nursing home where she worked.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9)
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story with Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Five years after she was groomed and abducted by the most popular teacher in school, Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal, with famed kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After an argument in his home, a man answers a knock at his front door and is suddenly shot and killed.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A domestic violence defendant loses his temper during a virtual hearing; grieving parents speak directly to their sons' killer; a judge has strong words for a teen arsonist; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused burglar keeps falling asleep during his virtual hearing; a judge has no time for Sovereign Citizen tactics; a drunk school bus driver shows up impaired for his plea hearing; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: When a Mobile mother of four is shot just blocks from her home, detectives look to her loved ones to identify her killer. But, at trial, his attorneys claim he acted in self-defence.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: 18-year-old Nicole Brown meets 30-year-old OJ Simpson while working as a hostess, sparking a whirlwind romance. Despite appearing as the perfect wife and mother, Nicole endures OJ's abuse in private.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: The Series
programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1)
programme.desc: After meeting at a salsa club, Lulu and Ramon Sosa find they make a good team and marry. But after having financial difficulties, the relationship breaks down.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: An online dispute turns into a physical fight that ends with a mother losing her life. As Det. Fyfe unravels names of possible suspects, he zeroes in on a gang that has been terrorising the city.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A gas station worker faces down the barrel of a gun and is ordered to empty her registers; a man running an errand goes on a high speed chase to elude carjackers.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2)
programme.desc: A woman is stalked in her apartment; a man stops a carjacking by using an unusual weapon against his attackers; a convenience store clerk uses his martial arts training to stave off a robber; and more.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3)
programme.desc: This special brings viewers inside the courtroom as celebrities are forced to sit in the hot seat and provide on-camera testimony.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: With the help of digital forensics, authorities are able to debunk the alibi of one of the last people to see a 24-year-old missing jogger in rural Arkansas, making him the primary suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: Danger Force

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.desc: You'll learn all you need to get your boating license in this educational driving film.

programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Captain Man & Danger Force offer to host the ultimate wedding for Swellview's beloved newscaster Trent Overunder and his online girlfriend Tracy426. When they suspect Tracy426 isn't who she claims to be, their meddling threatens to ruin the big day.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: When Danger Force's fingerprints show up on crime scene evidence, they must break into police headquarters and wipe the prints, or their secret identities--and Danger Force itself--will be ruined.
